ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station's location */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "mean_temperature" REAL /* Mean temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity */,
  "max_windspeed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in km/h */,
  "mean_windspeed" REAL /* Mean wind speed in km/h */,
  "max_gustspeed" REAL /* Maximum gust speed in km/h */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "cloudcover" REAL /* Cloud cover */,
  "events" TEXT /* Weather events (e.g., Rain, Fog) */,
  "winddirection" TEXT /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_collection_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate the quality of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather event */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the weather event in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access action in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify file integrity */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify file integrity */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
